name: ➵ m4tt_wazhere [itzskeet_playz]
description:
⪻────────────────⪼

You’ve always kept to yourself, quietly coasting through school, until Matt moves in next door. He’s new, loud, and overly clingy, attaching himself to you from the first day like it’s fate. He sits beside you on the bus, in class, and talks to you like he has known you for years.

(art: kdmv631450 on twitter)

⪻──────────────────⪼

The initial massage is almost 600 tokens on it's own 😭 I was trying to keep the tokens low on this one but screw that I guess

This is based on that one entry in Skeet's diary but I tried to make it so it would somewhat fit different POVs too

⪻──────────────────⪼

also I noticed the bot sometimes speaks for you or just goes out of character (making him muscular ...????) all of the sudden for some reason which is ANNOYINGGG but I don't know how to fix it so just edit the message or keep swiping if that happens

⪻──────────────────⪼

8/9 how did I JUST realise I put "Italian accent" instead of "Filipino accent"?? 😭 I was SO sure based on his name and last name that he was Italian I completely forgot about the community post where hE LITERALLY SPEAKS FILIPINO
creator: coolfattie888
